videos.title: Cross Country Skiing at Stake Lake British Columbia
videos.description:
In this episode the gang plus some new friends head up to the stave lake ski trails where the majority of us try cross country skiing for the first time. The weather was less then ideal but that didn't stop us from trekking away!
Song: Brolly I need Heaven
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Z8aGAMkKyZ8
Thumbnail credits to Dani

videos.title: Black Jack Cross Country
videos.description:
The Black Jack Cross Country Ski Club in Rossland has some of the best XC track found anywhere. With cabins, a high elevation and a whole range of run abilities everyone can find something that fits their winter adventures. #Rossland

Video by: Bohdan Doval
videos.transcript:
[Music]
yes we are here at the blackjack cross
country ski trails in Rosslyn 2bc just
about oh maybe two kilometres outside of
the downtown Ross and core and at
blackjack cross country ski trails we
have 56 kilometres of awesomely groomed
pristine trails and they're groomed we
have two awesome machines that will do
the grooming on a daily basis and
they're groomed to world-class standards
so along with the Black Jack
cross-country ski club we do offer an
evening excursion which takes place here
it's called Lafitte sea fromage and we
take out groups of eight to twelve
people in the evening to a remote cabin
and to enjoy a really nice authentic
French fondue dinner

videos.title: After Record Snowstorm, Pop-Up Ski Race In Minneapolis
videos.description: John Munger, the executive director of the Loppet Foundation, says the skiers were “ecstatic” about the race Monday morning (0:44). WCCO 4 News At Noon – April 16, 2018
